scope.summary: Polish the desktop cloud-only UI for daily use without changing backend trust boundaries.
goals: Make cloud sign-in/device/linking states clearer in the QR/login gate
Expose cloud mode and realtime status in the chat shell
Improve file/send affordances in cloud mode

acceptance.description: Cloud mode surfaces connection status, device/account state, retry/error states, and send/file affordances clearly with cloud-only copy.

verification.manual: Attach frontend check/build output and a static UI review summary for the touched Svelte components.
